title: Claire Littley
wikitext:
[[Image:Claire Eva Fly Me.jpg|thumb|right|Claire Littley]]

Claire, her full name Claire Littley, is the British singer for the Ending Theme of [[Neon Genesis Evangelion]], [[Fly Me to the Moon]]. According to her My Space page, the vocal arrangement for the song was her own, while the orchestra arrangement was by Toshiyuki Omori. She personally feels that it's a "beautiful track" and "was wonderful and an inspiration to sing to".




=Notes=

**Claire's [http://www.youtube.com/user/clairelittley Youtube]
**Claire's Instagram: @claire_littley
